headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving on Thursday?
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Bio-Techne, Lowers Price Target to $62
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Brandon Couillard   maintains Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $76 to $62.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Bio-Techne, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Daniel Markowitz   maintains Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $54 to $50.

headline: Bio-Techne Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Bio-Techne (NASDAQ:TECH) reported fiscal third-quarter 2026 results marked by uneven end-market conditions, with strong demand from large pharmaceutical customers and stabilizing U.S. academic trends offset by continued weakness in emerging biotech spending.
